subject: Try The Times for just $5 for 12 weeks -- includes the new NYT Now app.
body:
Try a Digital Subscription -- just $5 for your first 12 weeks
http://e.newyorktimesinfo.com/a/tBTTlSnB81HXJB85bG8AAwENcOm/sub1

-----------------------------------------------------------------

View in browser:
http://e.newyorktimesinfo.com/a/tBTTlSnB81HXJB85bG8AAwENcOm/viwb?t_params=EMAIL%3Djeeproject%2540yahoo.com%26REGI_ID%3D47275261

-----------------------------------------------------------------

-- THE NEW YORK TIMES --

SUBSCRIBE, SHOP, SAVE WITH THE NEW YORK TIMES

http://e.newyorktimesinfo.com/a/tBTTlSnB81HXJB85bG8AAwENcOm/sub2

-----------------------------------------------------------------

Try a Digital Subscription -- just $5 for your first 12 weeks.

The New York Times satisfies your need to know by connecting you 
to the news, stories and insights that impact your world.

Stay informed and inspired with unlimited digital access to 
NYTimes.com; delivering immersive storytelling and innovative 
multimedia coverage of the topics that interest you most. Plus, 
enjoy top stories handpicked by our editors, news summaries and 
updates with the new NYT Now iPhone(R) app, included free with 
your subscription. You'll also get two What We're Reading 
emails every week, bringing you Times journalists' 
recommendations of stories around the web. 

Get Digital:
http://e.newyorktimesinfo.com/a/tBTTlSnB81HXJB85bG8AAwENcOm/sub3

-----------------------------------------------------------------

Great Products, Distinctive Gifts, Free Shipping.

Browse an extraordinary selection of carefully curated items at 
The New York Times Store. Reflecting the values, content and 
history of America's preeminent newspaper, The Times Store 
is a source of distinctive merchandise for you or for 
gifts. Your shopping adventure will include everything from 
personalized products and classic photography to women's 
accessories, sports memorabilia and children's toys. Get 
free shipping on orders over $99.00 (code: 99SHIP*).

Browse Now:
http://e.newyorktimesinfo.com/a/tBTTlSnB81HXJB85bG8AAwENcOm/storet

-----------------------------------------------------------------

This email was sent to you as a registered user on NYTimes.com.

Promotional offers for new subscribers only. Smartphone and 
tablet apps are not supported on all devices. NYTimes.com + 
Smartphone Apps, NYTimes.com + Tablet Apps and All Digital 
Access subscriptions do not include e-reader editions, Times 
Premier content, Premium Crosswords or The New York Times 
Crosswords apps. You will be billed $5 for the first 12 weeks 
up front which is nonrefundable. After the first 12 weeks, 
all subscriptions will automatically renew and your credit 
card or PayPal account will be charged in advance of each 
four-week billing period unless canceled. If the subscription 
is canceled, refunds and termination of access will follow 
the Terms of Sale policy. Prices are in U.S. dollars and are 
subject to change. Other restrictions and taxes may apply.

*99SHIP free shipping offer applies only to purchases of a 
minimum of $99, before shipping and tax, on nytstore.com. 
Offer applies to domestic U.S.A. ground shipping only. 
Offer may not be combined with any other offers, discounts 
or coupons. Offer does not apply to returns or previously 
placed orders. Offer ends 11:59 p.m. E.T., Friday, May 2, 2014.

To ensure delivery of e-mails from The New York Times, please
add nytimes@e.newyorktimesinfo.com to your address book.

The New York Times:
http://e.newyorktimesinfo.com/a/tBTTlSnB81HXJB85bG8AAwENcOm/nyt

Privacy Policy:
http://e.newyorktimesinfo.com/a/tBTTlSnB81HXJB85bG8AAwENcOm/privacy

Contact Us:
help@nytimes.com

body_html:
Try a Digital Subscription — just $5 for your first 12 weeks
View in browser
Try a Digital Subscription —
just $5 for your first 12 weeks.

The New York Times satisfies your need to know by connecting you to the news, stories and insights that impact your world.

Stay informed and inspired with unlimited digital access to NYTimes.com; delivering immersive storytelling and innovative multimedia coverage of the topics that interest you most. Plus, enjoy top stories handpicked by our editors, news summaries and updates with the new NYT Now iPhone® app, included free with your subscription. You’ll also get two What We’re Reading emails every week, bringing you Times journalists’ recommendations of stories around the web.

Great Products, Distinctive Gifts,
Free Shipping.

Browse an extraordinary selection of carefully curated items at The New York Times Store. Reflecting the values, content and history of America’s preeminent newspaper, The Times Store is a source of distinctive merchandise for you or for gifts. Your shopping adventure will include everything from personalized products and classic photography to women’s accessories, sports memorabilia and children’s toys. Get free shipping on orders over $99.00 (code: 99SHIP*).




This email was sent to you as a registered user on NYTimes.com.

Promotional offers for new subscribers only. Smartphone and tablet apps are not supported on all devices. NYTimes.com + Smartphone Apps, NYTimes.com + Tablet Apps and All Digital Access subscriptions do not include e-reader editions, Times Premier content, Premium Crosswords or The New York Times Crosswords apps. You will be billed $5 for the first 12 weeks up front which is nonrefundable. After the first 12 weeks, all subscriptions will automatically renew and your credit card or PayPal account will be charged in advance of each four-week billing period unless canceled. If the subscription is canceled, refunds and termination of access will follow the Terms of Sale policy. Prices are in U.S. dollars and are subject to change. Other restrictions and taxes may apply.

*99SHIP free shipping offer applies only to purchases of a minimum of $99, before shipping and tax, on nytstore.com. Offer applies to domestic U.S.A. ground shipping only.
